attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
  WI_NCR.BATCH_ID,COALESCE(WI_NCR.ACCOUNTING_RULE_ID,-999) ,WI_NCR.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,WI_NCR.ACCOUNT_CLASS,WI_NCR.ACCOUNT_CODE,                
  WI_NCR.ACCTD_AMOUNT,COALESCE(WI_NCR.ADJUSTMENT_ID,-9999) ,WI_NCR.ADJUSTMENT_NUMBER,WI_NCR.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE,WI_NCR.AMOUNT,
  COALESCE(WI_NCR.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_ID,-999),COALESCE(WI_NCR.BILL_TO_SITE_USE_ID,-999),
  WI_NCR.CODE_COMBINATION_ID,WI_NCR.COGS_PERCENT,WI_NCR.COMMENTS,WI_NCR.CONTEXT,WI_NCR.CREATED_BY,WI_NCR.CREATION_DATE,
  COALESCE(WI_NCR.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,-9999),COALESCE(WI_NCR.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,-9999),COALESCE(WI_NCR.CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST_ID,-9999),
  WI_NCR.DEFAULT_SC_FLAG,WI_NCR.EXTENDED_AMOUNT,WI_NCR.EXTRACT_TYPE,WI_NCR.FISCAL_ID,WI_NCR.FORWARD_REVERSE_FLAG,
  WI_NCR.FUNC_CURRENCY_CODE,WI_NCR.GES_UPDATE_DATE,WI_NCR.GLOBAL_NAME ,WI_NCR.GL_DATE,WI_NCR.GL_POSTED_DATE,WI_NCR.GROUPING_ID,
  WI_NCR.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,
  WI_NCR.INVOICE_CURRENCY_CODE,
  WI_NCR.INVOICE_PERCENT,
  WI_NCR.INVOICING_RULE_ID,
  WI_NCR.LAST_UPDATED_BY,
  WI_NCR.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
  WI_NCR.LATEST_RECORD_FLAG,
  /*WI_NCR.LINE_SEQ_ID,*/
  COALESCE(WI_NCR.LINE_SEQ_ID, CASE WHEN WI_NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = 'UO' THEN -9999 WHEN WI_NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = 'BO' THEN -8888 ELSE -7777 END) AS LINE_SEQ_ID,
  WI_NCR.LINE_TYPE,
  WI_NCR.LINK_TO_CUST_TRX_LINE_ID,
  COALESCE(WI_NCR.ORDER_HEADER_ID,-9999),
  /* WI_NCR.ORDER_LINE_ID, */
  CASE WHEN WI_NCR.ORDER_LINE_ID IS NULL OR WI_NCR.ORDER_LINE_ID = 0 THEN -9999
   ELSE WI_NCR.ORDER_LINE_ID
  END AS  ORDER_LINE_ID,
  WI_NCR.ORDER_NUMBER,
  /* WI_NCR.ORG_ID, */
  CASE WHEN (WI_NCR.ORG_ID IS NULL AND WI_NCR.GLOBAL_NAME ='UO') THEN 161 
    WHEN  (WI_NCR.ORG_ID IS NULL AND WI_NCR.GLOBAL_NAME ='BO') THEN 112 
    ELSE WI_NCR.ORG_ID 
  END ORG_ID,
  WI_NCR.LINE_PERCENT,
  WI_NCR.PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,
  WI_NCR.PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,
  WI_NCR.QUOTA_FLAG,
  WI_NCR.REASON_CODE,
  WI_NCR.REBATE_AMOUNT,
  WI_NCR.REBATE_PERCENTAGE_ID,
  COALESCE(WI_NCR.REQUEST_ID,-999),
  WI_NCR.RULE_START_DATE,
  COALESCE(WI_NCR.SALESREP_ID,-999) ,
  COALESCE(WI_NCR.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_ID,-999),
  WI_NCR.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_ID,
  COALESCE(WI_NCR.SHIP_TO_SITE_USE_ID,-999),
  COALESCE(WI_NCR.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ID,-999),
  WI_NCR.SOURCE_TYPE,
  WI_NCR.SPLIT_PERCENT,
  COALESCE(WI_NCR.TERRITORY_ID,-999),
  WI_NCR.TRANSACTION_DATE,
  WI_NCR.TRANSACTION_GROUPING_TYPE,
  WI_NCR.TRANSACTION_QUANTITY,
  ROW_NUMBER () OVER ( ORDER BY WI_NCR.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD,WI_NCR.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY )+COALESCE(MT_DRVD.MAX_KEY,0) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID,
  WI_NCR.TRX_DATE,
  WI_NCR.TRX_NAME,
  WI_NCR.TRX_NUMBER,
  WI_NCR.TRX_TYPE,
  WI_NCR.UNIT_SELLING_PRICE,
  WI_NCR.UNIT_STANDARD_PRICE,
  WI_NCR.CREATE_DATETIME,
  WI_NCR.ACTION_CODE,
  WI_NCR.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD,
  WI_NCR.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY,
  BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE,
  SALES_REP_NUMBER,
  SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
  WI_NCR.SK_TRX_ID_INT, 
  WI_NCR.XAAS_OA_FLAG, 
  COALESCE(WI_NCR.SK_SC_AGENT_ID_INT, CASE WHEN WI_NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = 'UO' THEN -9999 WHEN WI_NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = 'BO' THEN -8888 ELSE -7777 END) AS SK_SC_AGENT_ID_INT,
  AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY,  
 BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT, 
 ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY,
 SOURCE_DELETED_FLG,
SOURCE_DATA_KEY5,
TSV_FLAG,
MERAKI_FLAG
   FROM
   (
   SELECT
   BATCH_ID,   ACCOUNTING_RULE_ID,   ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,   ACCOUNT_CLASS,   ACCOUNT_CODE,   ACCTD_AMOUNT,   ADJUSTMENT_ID,   ADJUSTMENT_NUMBER,   ADJUSTMENT_TYPE,   AMOUNT,   BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_ID,   BILL_TO_SITE_USE_ID,   CODE_COMBINATION_ID,   COGS_PERCENT,   COMMENTS,   CONTEXT,   CREATED_BY,   CREATION_DATE,   CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,   CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,   CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST_ID,   DEFAULT_SC_FLAG,   EXTENDED_AMOUNT,   EXTRACT_TYPE,   FISCAL_ID,   FORWARD_REVERSE_FLAG,   FUNC_CURRENCY_CODE,   GES_UPDATE_DATE,   GLOBAL_NAME,   GL_DATE,   GL_POSTED_DATE,   GROUPING_ID,   INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,   INVOICE_CURRENCY_CODE,   INVOICE_PERCENT,   INVOICING_RULE_ID,   LAST_UPDATED_BY,   LAST_UPDATE_DATE,   LATEST_RECORD_FLAG,   LINE_SEQ_ID,   LINE_TYPE,   LINK_TO_CUST_TRX_LINE_ID,   ORDER_HEADER_ID,   ORDER_LINE_ID,   ORDER_NUMBER,   ORG_ID,   LINE_PERCENT,   PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,   PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,   QUOTA_FLAG,   REASON_CODE,   REBATE_AMOUNT,   REBATE_PERCENTAGE_ID,   REQUEST_ID,   RULE_START_DATE,   SALESREP_ID,   SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_ID,   SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_ID,   SHIP_TO_SITE_USE_ID,   SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ID,   SOURCE_TYPE,   SPLIT_PERCENT,   TERRITORY_ID,   TRANSACTION_DATE,   TRANSACTION_GROUPING_TYPE,   TRANSACTION_QUANTITY,   TRX_DATE,   TRX_NAME,   TRX_NUMBER,   TRX_TYPE,   UNIT_SELLING_PRICE,   UNIT_STANDARD_PRICE,   CREATE_DATETIME,   ACTION_CODE,   DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD AS DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD,   DV_TRANSACTION_KEY AS DV_TRANSACTION_KEY,   CAST('Direct Sales' AS VARCHAR(50)) AS BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE,   CAST('99998' AS VARCHAR(30)) AS SALES_REP_NUMBER,   CAST(73106 AS INTEGER) AS SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,   CAST(-999 AS INTEGER) AS SK_TRX_ID_INT ,    CAST('N' AS CHAR(1) )AS XAAS_OA_FLAG,     SK_SC_AGENT_ID_INT,
   -7777 AS AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY,
  CAST ( -999 AS INTEGER ) as ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY, CAST (-999 AS INTEGER )AS BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT /*defaulting for NON-CSPP_VIP data*/  ,'=' AS SOURCE_DELETED_FLG,cast('UNKNOWN' AS VARCHAR(250)) SOURCE_DATA_KEY5,'N'AS TSV_FLAG,'N'AS MERAKI_FLAG
  FROM $$STGDB.WI_NCR_AR_TRX
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
  BATCH_ID,   ACCOUNTING_RULE_ID,   ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,   ACCOUNT_CLASS,   ACCOUNT_CODE,   ACCTD_AMOUNT,   ADJUSTMENT_ID,   ADJUSTMENT_NUMBER,   ADJUSTMENT_TYPE,   AMOUNT,   BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_ID,  BILL_TO_SITE_USE_ID,   CODE_COMBINATION_ID,   COGS_PERCENT,   COMMENTS,   CONTEXT,   CREATED_BY,   CREATION_DATE,   CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,   CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,   CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST_ID,   DEFAULT_SC_FLAG,  EXTENDED_AMOUNT,   EXTRACT_TYPE,   FISCAL_ID,   FORWARD_REVERSE_FLAG,   FUNC_CURRENCY_CODE,   GES_UPDATE_DATE,   GLOBAL_NAME,   GL_DATE,   GL_POSTED_DATE,   GROUPING_ID,   INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,  INVOICE_CURRENCY_CODE,   INVOICE_PERCENT,   INVOICING_RULE_ID,   LAST_UPDATED_BY,   LAST_UPDATE_DATE,   LATEST_RECORD_FLAG,   LINE_SEQ_ID,   LINE_TYPE,   LINK_TO_CUST_TRX_LINE_ID,   ORDER_HEADER_ID,  ORDER_LINE_ID,   ORDER_NUMBER,   ORG_ID,   LINE_PERCENT,   PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,   PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,   QUOTA_FLAG,   REASON_CODE,   REBATE_AMOUNT,   REBATE_PERCENTAGE_ID,   REQUEST_ID,   RULE_START_DATE,   SALESREP_ID,   SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_ID,   SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_ID,   SHIP_TO_SITE_USE_ID,   SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ID,   SOURCE_TYPE,   SPLIT_PERCENT,   TERRITORY_ID,   TRANSACTION_DATE,  TRANSACTION_GROUPING_TYPE,   TRANSACTION_QUANTITY,   TRX_DATE,   TRX_NAME,   TRX_NUMBER,   TRX_TYPE,   UNIT_SELLING_PRICE,   UNIT_STANDARD_PRICE,   CREATE_DATETIME,   ACTION_CODE,   DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD AS DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD,   DV_TRANSACTION_KEY AS DV_TRANSACTION_KEY,   CAST('Direct Sales' AS VARCHAR(50)) AS BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE,   CAST('99998' AS VARCHAR(30)) AS SALES_REP_NUMBER,   CAST(73106 AS INTEGER) AS SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,    -999 AS SK_TRX_ID_INT,    'N' AS XAAS_OA_FLAG,     SK_SC_AGENT_ID_INT,   -7777 AS AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY,CAST ( -999 AS INTEGER ) as ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY,/*defaulting for NON-CSPP_VIP data*/    CAST (-999 AS INTEGER ) AS  BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT /*defaulting for NON-CSPP_VIP data*/    ,'=' AS SOURCE_DELETED_FLG  ,'UNKNOWN' AS SOURCE_DATA_KEY5,
'N'AS TSV_FLAG,'N'AS MERAKI_FLAG  FROM $$STGDB.WI_NCR_REV_TRX
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
  BATCH_ID,ACCOUNTING_RULE_ID,ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,ACCOUNT_CLASS,ACCOUNT_CODE,ACCTD_AMOUNT,ADJUSTMENT_ID,ADJUSTMENT_NUMBER,ADJUSTMENT_TYPE,AMOUNT,BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_ID,
  BILL_TO_SITE_USE_ID,CODE_COMBINATION_ID,COGS_PERCENT,COMMENTS,CONTEXT,CREATED_BY,CREATION_DATE,CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST_ID,
  DEFAULT_SC_FLAG,EXTENDED_AMOUNT,EXTRACT_TYPE,FISCAL_ID,FORWARD_REVERSE_FLAG,FUNC_CURRENCY_CODE,GES_UPDATE_DATE,GLOBAL_NAME,GL_DATE,GL_POSTED_DATE,
  GROUPING_ID,INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,INVOICE_CURRENCY_CODE,INVOICE_PERCENT,INVOICING_RULE_ID,LAST_UPDATED_BY,LAST_UPDATE_DATE,LATEST_RECORD_FLAG,LINE_SEQ_ID,
  LINE_TYPE,LINK_TO_CUST_TRX_LINE_ID,ORDER_HEADER_ID,ORDER_LINE_ID,ORDER_NUMBER,ORG_ID,LINE_PERCENT,PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,
  QUOTA_FLAG,REASON_CODE,REBATE_AMOUNT,REBATE_PERCENTAGE_ID,REQUEST_ID,RULE_START_DATE,SALESREP_ID,SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_ID,SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_ID,SHIP_TO_SITE_USE_ID,
  SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ID,SOURCE_TYPE,SPLIT_PERCENT,TERRITORY_ID,TRANSACTION_DATE,TRANSACTION_GROUPING_TYPE,TRANSACTION_QUANTITY,TRX_DATE,TRX_NAME,TRX_NUMBER,
  TRX_TYPE,UNIT_SELLING_PRICE,UNIT_STANDARD_PRICE,CREATE_DATETIME,ACTION_CODE,DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD AS DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD,DV_TRANSACTION_KEY AS DV_TRANSACTION_KEY,
  CAST('Direct Sales' AS VARCHAR(50)) AS BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE,CAST('99998' AS VARCHAR(30)) AS SALES_REP_NUMBER,CAST(73106 AS INTEGER) AS SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
   -999 AS SK_TRX_ID_INT, 'N' AS XAAS_OA_FLAG,  SK_SC_AGENT_ID_INT,-7777 AS AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY,CAST ( -999 AS INTEGER ) as ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY,
   CAST (-999 AS INTEGER ) AS BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT ,'=' AS SOURCE_DELETED_FLG ,'UNKNOWN' AS SOURCE_DATA_KEY5,'N'AS TSV_FLAG,'N'AS MERAKI_FLAG
  FROM $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_TRX
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
  BATCH_ID,ACCOUNTING_RULE_ID,ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,ACCOUNT_CLASS,ACCOUNT_CODE,ACCTD_AMOUNT,ADJUSTMENT_ID,ADJUSTMENT_NUMBER,ADJUSTMENT_TYPE,AMOUNT,BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_ID,
  BILL_TO_SITE_USE_ID,CODE_COMBINATION_ID,COGS_PERCENT,COMMENTS,CONTEXT,CREATED_BY,CREATION_DATE,CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST_ID,
  DEFAULT_SC_FLAG,EXTENDED_AMOUNT,EXTRACT_TYPE,FISCAL_ID,FORWARD_REVERSE_FLAG,FUNC_CURRENCY_CODE,GES_UPDATE_DATE,GLOBAL_NAME,GL_DATE,GL_POSTED_DATE,GROUPING_ID,
  INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,INVOICE_CURRENCY_CODE,INVOICE_PERCENT,INVOICING_RULE_ID,LAST_UPDATED_BY,LAST_UPDATE_DATE,LATEST_RECORD_FLAG,LINE_SEQ_ID,LINE_TYPE,
  LINK_TO_CUST_TRX_LINE_ID,ORDER_HEADER_ID,ORDER_LINE_ID,ORDER_NUMBER,ORG_ID,LINE_PERCENT,PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,QUOTA_FLAG,
  REASON_CODE,REBATE_AMOUNT,REBATE_PERCENTAGE_ID,REQUEST_ID,RULE_START_DATE,SALESREP_ID,SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_ID,SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_ID,SHIP_TO_SITE_USE_ID,SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ID,
  SOURCE_TYPE,SPLIT_PERCENT,TERRITORY_ID,TRANSACTION_DATE,TRANSACTION_GROUPING_TYPE,TRANSACTION_QUANTITY,TRX_DATE,TRX_NAME,TRX_NUMBER,TRX_TYPE,
  UNIT_SELLING_PRICE,UNIT_STANDARD_PRICE,CREATE_DATETIME,ACTION_CODE,DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD AS DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD,DV_TRANSACTION_KEY AS DV_TRANSACTION_KEY,
  CAST('Direct Sales' AS VARCHAR(50)) AS BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE,CAST('99998' AS VARCHAR(30)) AS SALES_REP_NUMBER,CAST(73106 AS INTEGER) AS SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
   -999 AS SK_TRX_ID_INT, 'N' AS XAAS_OA_FLAG,  SK_SC_AGENT_ID_INT,-7777 AS AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY,CAST ( -999 AS INTEGER ) as ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY,CAST (-999 AS INTEGER ) AS BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT 
  ,'=' AS SOURCE_DELETED_FLG,'UNKNOWN' AS SOURCE_DATA_KEY5,'N'AS TSV_FLAG,'N'AS MERAKI_FLAG FROM $$STGDB.WI_NCR_CFI_TRX
   UNION ALL
   SELECT
   BATCH_ID,ACCOUNTING_RULE_ID,ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,ACCOUNT_CLASS,ACCOUNT_CODE,ACCTD_AMOUNT,ADJUSTMENT_ID,ADJUSTMENT_NUMBER,ADJUSTMENT_TYPE,AMOUNT,BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_ID,  BILL_TO_SITE_USE_ID,CODE_COMBINATION_ID,COGS_PERCENT,COMMENTS,CONTEXT,CREATED_BY,CREATION_DATE,CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST_ID,DEFAULT_SC_FLAG,EXTENDED_AMOUNT,EXTRACT_TYPE,FISCAL_ID,FORWARD_REVERSE_FLAG,FUNC_CURRENCY_CODE,GES_UPDATE_DATE,GLOBAL_NAME,GL_DATE,GL_POSTED_DATE,GROUPING_ID,INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,INVOICE_CURRENCY_CODE,INVOICE_PERCENT,INVOICING_RULE_ID,LAST_UPDATED_BY,LAST_UPDATE_DATE,LATEST_RECORD_FLAG,LINE_SEQ_ID,LINE_TYPE,LINK_TO_CUST_TRX_LINE_ID,ORDER_HEADER_ID,ORDER_LINE_ID,ORDER_NUMBER,ORG_ID,LINE_PERCENT,PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,QUOTA_FLAG,REASON_CODE,REBATE_AMOUNT,REBATE_PERCENTAGE_ID,REQUEST_ID,RULE_START_DATE,SALESREP_ID,SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_ID,SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_ID,SHIP_TO_SITE_USE_ID,SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ID,SOURCE_TYPE,SPLIT_PERCENT,TERRITORY_ID,TRANSACTION_DATE,TRANSACTION_GROUPING_TYPE,TRANSACTION_QUANTITY,TRX_DATE,TRX_NAME,TRX_NUMBER,TRX_TYPE,UNIT_SELLING_PRICE,UNIT_STANDARD_PRICE,CREATE_DATETIME,ACTION_CODE,DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD AS DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD,DV_TRANSACTION_KEY AS DV_TRANSACTION_KEY,BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE     ,SALES_REP_NUMBER              ,SALES_TERRITORY_KEY , CAST(-999 AS INTEGER) AS SK_TRX_ID_INT,  'N' AS XAAS_OA_FLAG ,  SK_SC_AGENT_ID_INT, -7777 AS AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY ,  CAST ( -999 AS INTEGER ) as ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY,/*defaulting for NON-CSPP_VIP data*/
  CAST (-999 AS INTEGER ) AS BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT /*defaulting for NON-CSPP_VIP data*/
  ,'=' AS SOURCE_DELETED_FLG 
,'UNKNOWN' AS SOURCE_DATA_KEY5,'N' AS TSV_FLAG, 'N' AS MERAKI_FLAG
   FROM $$STGDB.WI_NCR_AR_TRX_CG
   UNION ALL
   SELECT
   BATCH_ID,ACCOUNTING_RULE_ID,ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,ACCOUNT_CLASS,ACCOUNT_CODE,ACCTD_AMOUNT,ADJUSTMENT_ID,ADJUSTMENT_NUMBER,ADJUSTMENT_TYPE,AMOUNT,BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_ID,BILL_TO_SITE_USE_ID,CODE_COMBINATION_ID,COGS_PERCENT,COMMENTS,CONTEXT,CREATED_BY,CREATION_DATE,CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST_ID,DEFAULT_SC_FLAG,EXTENDED_AMOUNT,EXTRACT_TYPE,FISCAL_ID,FORWARD_REVERSE_FLAG,FUNC_CURRENCY_CODE,GES_UPDATE_DATE,GLOBAL_NAME,GL_DATE,GL_POSTED_DATE,GROUPING_ID,INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,INVOICE_CURRENCY_CODE,INVOICE_PERCENT,INVOICING_RULE_ID,LAST_UPDATED_BY,LAST_UPDATE_DATE,LATEST_RECORD_FLAG,LINE_SEQ_ID,LINE_TYPE,LINK_TO_CUST_TRX_LINE_ID,ORDER_HEADER_ID,ORDER_LINE_ID,ORDER_NUMBER,ORG_ID,LINE_PERCENT,PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,QUOTA_FLAG,REASON_CODE,REBATE_AMOUNT,REBATE_PERCENTAGE_ID,REQUEST_ID,RULE_START_DATE,SALESREP_ID,SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_ID,SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_ID,SHIP_TO_SITE_USE_ID,SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ID,SOURCE_TYPE,SPLIT_PERCENT,TERRITORY_ID,TRANSACTION_DATE,TRANSACTION_GROUPING_TYPE,TRANSACTION_QUANTITY,TRX_DATE,TRX_NAME,TRX_NUMBER,TRX_TYPE,UNIT_SELLING_PRICE,UNIT_STANDARD_PRICE,CREATE_DATETIME,ACTION_CODE,DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD AS DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD,DV_TRANSACTION_KEY AS DV_TRANSACTION_KEY,BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE     ,SALES_REP_NUMBER              ,SALES_TERRITORY_KEY ,-999 AS SK_TRX_ID_INT, 'N' AS XAAS_OA_FLAG , SK_SC_AGENT_ID_INT,AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY , CAST ( -999 AS INTEGER ) as ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY,/*defaulting for NON-CSPP_VIP data*/  CAST (-999 AS INTEGER ) AS BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT /*defaulting for NON-CSPP_VIP data*/
  ,'=' AS SOURCE_DELETED_FLG
,'UNKNOWN' AS SOURCE_DATA_KEY5,'N' AS TSV_FLAG, 'N' AS MERAKI_FLAG
   FROM $$STGDB.WI_NCR_REV_TRX_CG
   UNION ALL
   SELECT
   BATCH_ID,ACCOUNTING_RULE_ID,ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,ACCOUNT_CLASS,ACCOUNT_CODE,ACCTD_AMOUNT,ADJUSTMENT_ID,ADJUSTMENT_NUMBER,ADJUSTMENT_TYPE,AMOUNT,BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_ID,BILL_TO_SITE_USE_ID,CODE_COMBINATION_ID,COGS_PERCENT,COMMENTS,CONTEXT,CREATED_BY,CREATION_DATE,CUSTOMER_TRX_ID, CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST_ID,DEFAULT_SC_FLAG,EXTENDED_AMOUNT,EXTRACT_TYPE,FISCAL_ID,FORWARD_REVERSE_FLAG,FUNC_CURRENCY_CODE,GES_UPDATE_DATE,GLOBAL_NAME,GL_DATE,GL_POSTED_DATE,GROUPING_ID,INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,INVOICE_CURRENCY_CODE,INVOICE_PERCENT,INVOICING_RULE_ID,LAST_UPDATED_BY,LAST_UPDATE_DATE,LATEST_RECORD_FLAG,LINE_SEQ_ID,LINE_TYPE,LINK_TO_CUST_TRX_LINE_ID,ORDER_HEADER_ID,ORDER_LINE_ID,ORDER_NUMBER,ORG_ID,LINE_PERCENT,PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,QUOTA_FLAG,REASON_CODE,REBATE_AMOUNT,REBATE_PERCENTAGE_ID,REQUEST_ID,RULE_START_DATE,SALESREP_ID,SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_ID,SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_ID,SHIP_TO_SITE_USE_ID,SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ID,SOURCE_TYPE,SPLIT_PERCENT,TERRITORY_ID,TRANSACTION_DATE,TRANSACTION_GROUPING_TYPE,TRANSACTION_QUANTITY,TRX_DATE,TRX_NAME,TRX_NUMBER,TRX_TYPE,UNIT_SELLING_PRICE,UNIT_STANDARD_PRICE,CREATE_DATETIME,ACTION_CODE,DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD AS DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD,DV_TRANSACTION_KEY AS DV_TRANSACTION_KEY,BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE     ,SALES_REP_NUMBER              ,SALES_TERRITORY_KEY , -999 AS SK_TRX_ID_INT,  'N' AS XAAS_OA_FLAG ,  SK_SC_AGENT_ID_INT, AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY	, CAST ( -999 AS INTEGER ) as ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY,/*defaulting for NON-CSPP_VIP data*/   CAST (-999 AS INTEGER ) AS BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT /*defaulting for NON-CSPP_VIP data*/   ,'=' AS SOURCE_DELETED_FLG
,'UNKNOWN' AS SOURCE_DATA_KEY5 ,'N' AS TSV_FLAG, 'N' AS MERAKI_FLAG
  FROM $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_TRX_CG

  CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST_ID,DEFAULT_SC_FLAG,EXTENDED_AMOUNT,EXTRACT_TYPE,FISCAL_ID,FORWARD_REVERSE_FLAG,FUNC_CURRENCY_CODE,GES_UPDATE_DATE,GLOBAL_NAME,GL_DATE,GL_POSTED_DATE,GROUPING_ID,INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,INVOICE_CURRENCY_CODE,INVOICE_PERCENT,INVOICING_RULE_ID,LAST_UPDATED_BY,LAST_UPDATE_DATE,LATEST_RECORD_FLAG,LINE_SEQ_ID,LINE_TYPE,LINK_TO_CUST_TRX_LINE_ID,ORDER_HEADER_ID,ORDER_LINE_ID,ORDER_NUMBER,ORG_ID,LINE_PERCENT,PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,QUOTA_FLAG,REASON_CODE,REBATE_AMOUNT,REBATE_PERCENTAGE_ID,REQUEST_ID,RULE_START_DATE,SALESREP_ID,SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_ID,SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_ID,SHIP_TO_SITE_USE_ID,SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ID,SOURCE_TYPE,SPLIT_PERCENT,TERRITORY_ID,TRANSACTION_DATE,TRANSACTION_GROUPING_TYPE,TRANSACTION_QUANTITY,TRX_DATE,TRX_NAME,TRX_NUMBER,TRX_TYPE,UNIT_SELLING_PRICE,UNIT_STANDARD_PRICE,CREATE_DATETIME,ACTION_CODE,DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD AS DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD,
  DV_TRANSACTION_KEY AS DV_TRANSACTION_KEY,BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE     ,SALES_REP_NUMBER              ,SALES_TERRITORY_KEY ,-999 AS SK_TRX_ID_INT, 
  'N' AS XAAS_OA_FLAG , 
  SK_SC_AGENT_ID_INT,
  -7777 AS AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY,
 CAST ( -999 AS INTEGER ) as ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY,/*defaulting for NON-CSPP_VIP data*/
  CAST (-999 AS INTEGER ) AS BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT /*defaulting for NON-CSPP_VIP data*/
  ,'=' AS SOURCE_DELETED_FLG  ,SOURCE_DATA_KEY5,'N' AS TSV_FLAG, MERAKI_FLAG   FROM $$STGDB.WI_NCR_RAE_COGS_TRX_RAO
    ) WI_NCR  ,
   ( SEL MAX(MT.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT) AS MAX_KEY      FROM
        (  /* SEL MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT   FROM   $$FINLGLVWDB.MT_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_BKG  UNION ALL  */ 
      SELECT MAX(BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT ) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_REV
   UNION ALL
   SELECT MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_BKG
   UNION ALL
   SELECT MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID )    AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OM_XXNCR_REVENUE_TRX_P
   UNION ALL
   SELECT MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID )    AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_WI_OM_XXNCR_REVENUE_TRX_P
   UNION ALL
   /* SEL MAX(BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT) as TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.MT_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_REV */
    SELECT MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID   ) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OM_XXNCR_REVENUE_TRX_RA_P
   UNION ALL
   SELECT MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID   ) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OM_XXNCR_REVENUE_TRX_RT_P
   UNION ALL
   SELECT MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID   ) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OM_XXNCR_REVENUE_TRX_RAE_P 
   /* CG Exception Tables*/
     UNION ALL
     SELECT MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID )    AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OM_XXNCR_REV_CG
     UNION ALL
     SELECT MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID )    AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_WI_OM_XXNCR_REV_CG
           UNION ALL
     SELECT MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID   ) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OM_XXNCR_REV_RT_CG
           UNION ALL
     SELECT MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID   ) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OM_XXNCR_REV_RAE_CG 
   /* Satchinn: added as a part of Lot-2B CG1 implementation  */   
           UNION ALL
     SELECT MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID   ) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OM_XXNCR_REV_RA_CG   
   /* CCSP VIP Changes*/
    UNION ALL 
    SELECT COALESCE(MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID   ),0) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OM_XXNCR_REV_CSPP_VIP_CG   
            /*Added RTE Exception tables */
    UNION ALL 
   SELECT COALESCE(MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID   ),0) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OM_XXNCR_REV_RA_RT  
    UNION ALL 
   SELECT COALESCE(MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID   ),0) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OM_XXNCR_REV_RT  
     UNION ALL 
   SELECT COALESCE(MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID   ),0) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_WI_OM_XXNCR_REV_RT 
   UNION ALL /* BBALIVAD added as part of SAAS implementation */
    SELECT MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID   ) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_WI_OM_XXNCR_REV_OA_S  /*bookings*/
    UNION ALL
    SELECT MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID   ) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OM_XXNCR_REV_OA_S /*bookings*/
    UNION ALL
    SELECT MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID   ) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OM_XXNCR_REV_RA_OA_S   /*revenue*/
    UNION ALL
       SELECT MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID   ) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_WI_OM_XXNCR_REV_OM  /*bookings*/
       UNION ALL
       SELECT MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID   ) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OM_XXNCR_REV_OM /*bookings*/
       UNION ALL
       SELECT MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID   ) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OM_XXNCR_REV_RT_OA_OM   /*revenue*/
	   UNION ALL   /* Added as part of Accruals Q2FY19 */ 
     SELECT MAX(BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NET_CHG_REV_ACRL_XAAS 
     UNION ALL
     SELECT MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$STGDB.WI_OM_XXNCR_REV_ACRL_TRX_CG
     UNION ALL
     SELECT MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_REV_ACRL_TRX_CG
  UNION ALL
     SELECT MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID   ) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OM_XXNCR_REV_ACRL_TRX_CG
 UNION ALL   /* Added as part of Meraki Q2FY19 */ 
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID),0) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$STGDB.WI_OM_XXNCR_REV_MERK_TRX_CG
UNION ALL
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID),0) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_REV_MERK_TRX_CG
UNION ALL
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID),0) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OM_XXNCR_REV_MERK_TRX_CG
UNION ALL SELECT MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID   ) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_WI_OM_XXNCR_REV_MERK_CG /*carbt*/
 UNION ALL SELECT MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID   ) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OM_XXNCR_REV_MERK_CG  /*carbt*/
  UNION ALL /*RAO CHANGES*/
     SELECT MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID   ) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OM_XXNCR_REV_RAE_RAO
UNION ALL 
	SELECT COALESCE(MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID),0) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OM_XXNCR_REV_SWSS_CG /*SWSS CHANGES*/
UNION ALL
	SELECT COALESCE(MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID),0) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_SWSS_CG /*SWSS CHANGES*/       
)MT
   ) MT_DRVD
